title: Rollerfish

The '''rollerfish''' was a [[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long, elusive [[Fish/Legends|fish]] that was native to the upper ocean layers of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. Distinguished by the curved spines found along the dorsal and ventral ridges of their bodies, rollerfish were named for the way in which they captured and killed their prey. After grasping prey with their [[Tooth/Legends|toothy]] mouths, rollerfish then rolled their bodies around the prey, piercing it with their spines. The primary prey of the rollerfish was the [[sea-mouse]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] would occasionally take his son, [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba]], fishing off the platform ledges of [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]]. To get a fish, one must spear it. Hitting a certain area will instantly stun the fish, making for an easy catch.
